title: Alabard's Comets
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:AlabardsCometsBase-LordsOfTheExpanse.jpg|thumb|right|350px|Alabard's Comets base on the moon of [[Sheva]]]]

'''Alabard's Comets''' were a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] military unit operating in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. They maintained a base on the barren moon of the planet [[Sheva]] in the [[Freeworlds Territory]]. The base was used as a listening post from where they could use a captured [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] receiver to intercept and analyze [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] orders throughout the sector. The information gathered was then relayed back to [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. The base also contained a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]].

The unit maintained eight [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] fighters, two [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] fighters and one shuttle. They would occasionally strike at targets along the [[Shapani Bypass]], posing as [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

The base personnel were highly versatile, they flew and maintain their ships while operating the HoloNet receiver.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
